title: elho Loft Urban Round 40 - Large Plant Pot Outdoor - 100% Recycled Plastic - Ø 38.5 x H 35.3 cm - Red/Theatre Red
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE | The pot is built for extensive and long-term use. The colour doesn’t fade in the sun, the pot is frost resistant and it can handle a bit of dirt and rough handling; which is why you get a 2-year warranty.
MIX & MATCH | This pot is available in various colours and sizes that go together very nicely. This way, you can find the perfect pot for any outside space and every plant.
INVISIBLE WHEELS | Time for something different? Just roll it out! Thanks to the invisible wheels, you can easily move the pot with plant around. Wherever and whenever you want.
INCLUDING WATER RESERVOIR | Don’t worry about big rainstorms. The convenient water reservoir collects the excess water until it is time to give a little back to your plant again.
RECYCLED PLASTIC | The pot is made of 100% recycled plastic, produced using wind energy and is 100% recyclable.
description: Turn your balcony, garden or roof terrace into a beautiful green spot with this urban collection by elho. Having plants to take care of will not be a problem for you: each pot comes with a built-in water reservoir, collecting the surplus from watering or a downpour. This round flower pot has small wheels, so you can always rearrange your terrace or create some extra space for a garden party for instance. Available in the a wide range of colours so you can endlessly vary and create your own atmosphere.Enjoy more greenery in your life Whether you want to turn your living room into a green oasis, or want more greenery in your garden or on your balcony, we’re with you! Surrounding yourself with greenery makes you happier, healthier, and gives you a serious energy boost. We want to make it as easy as possible for you to bring more greenery into your life. That’s why we make the most beautiful design pots and smart solutions for easy plant care, so you can enjoy your plants without worries. With love for nature Of course, loving plants also means loving nature. That’s why you can be sure that we made this flowerpot with nature in mind. It’s made of recycled plastic, it’s fully recyclable, and it’s produced using wind energy from our own wind turbine. This wind turbine is in our backyard (just like the home for our 2,000,000 bees - who don’t produce pots, but are very good for the environment!). The fact that we care about the world, nature, and people, has been rewarded with a B Corp certificate. This is a certificate given to companies throughout the world who excel in environmental impact and transparency among other things. Only a few companies in the Netherlands have this certificate, which makes us exceptionally proud!
